query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.locationAddress, s.status, s.monthlyCost, s.provider, s.locationExternalId
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0038'
ORDER BY s.locationAddress, s.serviceType;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

FROM services s
